data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplified navigation to reduce decision time.
data.technical_spec: Minimalistic menu design to facilitate faster choices.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Accessible clickable elements to enhance user interaction.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Consistent user experience leveraging familiar web patterns.
data.technical_spec: UI components consistent with industry standards.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Limiting information loads to enhance cognitive processing.
data.technical_spec: Grouped relevant information in digestible units.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Objects positioned close are perceived as a group.
